question: Will Apple announce Vision Pro 2 (or any new Vision Pro hardware) at WWDC 2026 (June 8-12)?
textDescription: Apple WWDC 2026 runs June 8-12 in Cupertino. Polymarket prices 'Vision Pro 2 released before 2027' at 5% YES — Bloomberg/Mark Gurman reported Apple shelved the 2025 refresh, with high-end successor now eyed for 2027 amid sluggish original Vision Pro sales and excess inventory. RESOLVES YES if, during the June 8-12 WWDC keynote or session, Apple officially announces new Vision Pro hardware (Vision Pro 2, Vision Pro Lite, Apple Vision SE, or any other variant). Announcement must be from Apple stage or official channels, not leaks. RESOLVES NO if no new Vision Pro hardware is announced. Software updates to visionOS, accessories (strap, light seal), or third-party app reveals do NOT count — must be Apple-branded hardware.
newsShortReason: Apple has no plans to announce new Vision Pro hardware at WWDC 2026.
newsKeyEvidence: Apple's roadmap doesn't currently call for a second-generation model until the end of 2026. | Apple is focusing on developing smart glasses, with the Vision Pro team reassigned to other projects. | Reports suggest Apple has discontinued development of the Vision Pro headset. | Apple has no plans to launch a second-generation Vision Pro headset until the end of 2026. | Apple is focusing on developing smart glasses, with the Vision Pro team reassigned to other projects.
